'''Chelch Dravvad''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the [[Senator/Legends|senator]] for the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] during the first [[Time/Legends|decades]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. He was also a member of the [[New Republic Advisory Council]] some [[25 ABY/Legends|twenty-five years after]] the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

He was a supporter of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Knights]] once he was convinced of the threat posed by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], but initially [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] did not know that he had an ally in him. Dravvad argued with [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Borsk Fey'lya]] when the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] politician became a clear opponent of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. Fey'lya accused the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] of leaving [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] undefended in order to protect the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], however Dravvad began an argument about the debate of leaving either Corellia or Bothawui unguarded.

During the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], Dravvad managed to escape from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], setting course for [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]], where he regrouped with other members of the Advisory Council, including the [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] would-be Chief of State, [[Pwoe]].
